## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include example commands or UI behavior if applicable.

```bash
# Example usage
ccs <new-command> --flag value
```

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
